ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-31-2023 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-21-2023 Continued To Sep-26-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Change Venue And Transfer Case To San Diego Superior Court
Off Calendar Jul-12-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CHRISTAMARIA ORMSBY's Motion To Change Venue And Transfer Case To San Diego Superior Court.

Defendant Christamaria Ormsby's unopposed "motion to change venue and transfer case to San Diego Superior Court" is granted. Moving party shall pay all transfer fees.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
